statement: The tools field in agent frontmatter uses a category/tool format (e.g., read/readFile, search/textSearch, web/fetch, edit/editFiles, execute/runInTerminal). A bare category name enables all tools in that category. Bare tool names without a category prefix (e.g., 'readFile' or 'fetch') are silently ignored and grant no tool access.
publicSummary: Agent frontmatter tools: field uses category/tool notation. Valid categories include read, search, web, edit, execute, agent, todo. Bare tool names without category prefix are silently ignored — agents appear to work but have no tool access. This is a common first-time mistake.
cautionNotes: Tool categories may expand over time. The listed categories were confirmed in early 2026 VS Code.
